## Describe your changes
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## Issue ticket number and link
# (e.g. #12)

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] If it is a core feature, I have added thorough comments.
- [ ] My code uses the existing `drizzle-orm` sqlite patterns in `lib/db/`.
- [ ] I have verified the Electron UI builds successfully via `pnpm build`.
- [ ] I have verified the AI tools load correctly within the IDE.
